integrity.description: The agent used the Zotero graphical user interface to update the metadata.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Zotero application open, with the agent clicking on items and typing into the right-hand Info pane.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a terminal or script to directly modify the Zotero SQLite database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows, Python scripts, or SQLite database browsers are used to execute commands bypassing the Zotero UI.

integrity.description: The metadata was entered into the correct Zotero fields, not just written in a text editor or a Zotero note.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values 'arXiv' and the numeric IDs are clearly visible inside the specific 'Library Catalog' and 'Call Number' text boxes in the Zotero 'Info' tab.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires updating metadata for three specific papers in Zotero. 1) 'Attention Is All You Need': Library Catalog = 'arXiv', Call Number = '1706.03762'. 2) 'BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding': Library Catalog = 'arXiv', Call Number = '1810.04805'. 3) 'Generative Adversarial Nets': Library Catalog = 'arXiv', Call Number = '1406.2661'.
